name: Favorite Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sifted brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure and sift the flour.
2. Sift baking soda, salt, and spices with the flour.
3. Cream butter until light and lemon-colored.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating after each addition.
5. Slowly beat in eggs until they are almost as thick as whipped cream.
6. Combine vinegar and milk.
7. Alternately add dry ingredients and liquid ingredients, beating until smooth after each addition.
8. Pour batter into a greased 8x8-inch pan.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 40-45 minutes.
Note: Frost with butter frosting.
